object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: Continuous white wooden baseboard trim approximately 3–5 inches tall running along the bottom edge of the walls and turning up the stair riser area. Paint appears semi-gloss white, separating the beige wall from the carpeted floor.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Borders the carpeted landing and meets the first riser of the staircase; runs underneath picture frames
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Continuous white wooden baseboard trim approximately 3–5 inches tall running along the bottom edge of the walls and turning up the stair riser area. Paint appears semi-gloss white, separating the beige wall from the carpeted floor.
object_a.text_input_for_clip_long: center sector | Continuous white wooden baseboard trim approximately 3–5 inches tall running along the bottom edge of the walls and turning up the stair riser area. Paint appears semi-gloss white, separating the beige wall from the carpeted floor.

object_b.label: couch
object_b.description: large dark brown/black leather reclining sofa (three-seat) angled slightly toward camera
object_b.long_form_open_description: Three-seat dark brown/black leather reclining sofa with visible seams and padded headrests; placed on the carpet facing toward the fireplace/TV wall and angled slightly left relative to camera. Leather shows soft sheen; cushions appear slightly worn but in good condition. Recliner footrests not extended.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: sits in front of the fireplace/TV wall, to the right of the left armchair and left of the right-side glass door
